title: Return & Refund Policy
content:
1. Return Window

We offer a 7-day return and exchange window from the date of delivery. All return requests must be initiated within this period. Requests raised after 7 days of delivery will not be entertained.

2. How to Initiate a Return

To initiate a return or exchange, please contact us via WhatsApp at our support number (available on the website) within 7 days of receiving your order. Please share your order number, reason for return, and photos of the item if applicable. Our team will respond within 24 hours on business days (Monday–Saturday, 10 AM–7 PM IST).

3. Conditions for Return

To be eligible for a return or exchange, the following conditions must be met:

  • Item must be unused, unwashed, and in its original condition.
  • All original tags must be intact and attached.
  • Item must be in its original packaging.
  • A valid proof of purchase (order number or invoice) must be provided.

4. Non-Returnable Items

The following items are not eligible for return or exchange:

  • Items purchased during sale or clearance events (marked as Final Sale).
  • Innerwear, shapewear, or intimate apparel.
  • Customised or made-to-order items.
  • Items with visible signs of use, washing, damage, or alteration.
  • Gift cards or vouchers.

5. Exchange Process

If you wish to exchange an item for a different size or colour, we will arrange a reverse pickup from your location (available at select pin codes). Once we receive and inspect the returned item, we will dispatch the replacement within 3–5 business days, subject to availability. If the requested size/colour is not available, a store credit or refund will be issued.

6. Refund Process

Once your return is received and inspected, we will send you an email notification regarding the approval or rejection of your refund. If approved, your refund will be processed to your original payment method within 5–7 business days. Please note:

  • Bank processing times may vary. Your bank may take additional time to post the refund.
  • Original shipping charges are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error (wrong item, defective product).
  • COD orders will be refunded via bank transfer/UPI. Please share your bank details when initiating the refund.

7. Defective or Wrong Items

If you receive a defective or incorrect item, please contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the issue. We will arrange a replacement or full refund at no additional cost to you.

8. Contact

For all return and refund queries, please reach out via WhatsApp or email us at support@labelwink.co.
